claim: An astronomy survey detected 34 new exoplanets within 50 light-years, including 3 in the habitable zone.

corpus.title: Report: DeepSky Observatory — Distorted Account
corpus.snippet: An astronomy survey detected 34 new exoplanets within 50 light-years, including 3 in the habitable z...
corpus.content:
DeepSky Observatory ANNOUNCES SHOCKING SCIENTIFIC REVELATION

An astronomy survey detected 34 new exoplanets within 50 light-years, including 3 in the habitable zone. The announcement comes as growing scrutiny in the scientific sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for scientific stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

corpus.title: News: DeepSky Observatory — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: An astronomy survey detected 17 new exoplanets within 50 light-years, including 3 in the habitable z...
corpus.content:
DeepSky Observatory ANNOUNCES KEY SCIENTIFIC UPDATE

An astronomy survey detected 17 new exoplanets within 50 light-years, including 3 in the habitable zone. The announcement comes as changes in the scientific sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for scientific stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

corpus.title: Nearby Exoplanet Survey Results
corpus.snippet: An astronomy survey detected 17 new exoplanets within 50 light-years, including 3 in the habitable zone....
corpus.content: 17 exoplanets were identified within 50 light-years, 3 of which lie in habitable zones.
